final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: character-expression-grid
Asset type: 3x3 expression sheet, character design reference
Primary request: 3x3 grid of 9 panels showing Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) from Chinese Paladin (仙剑奇侠传) peeking through torn holes in white paper, each panel with distinct expression and outfit
Scene/backdrop: uniform white paper background with torn circular holes, clean grid layout with subtle separators
Subject: young woman with long flowing black hair in traditional Chinese style, delicate features, inspired by Zhao Ling'er character design, appearing in 9 variations
Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar-style rendering, soft subsurface skin, stylized cartoon proportions
Composition/framing: 3x3 grid layout, each panel medium close-up framing head and shoulders through torn paper hole
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, warm and friendly atmosphere, consistent across all panels
Color palette: vibrant clothing colors (green, red, yellow, black/white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal) against clean white paper background
Materials/textures: smooth 3D rendered skin, fabric textures for various outfits, torn paper edges with fiber detail
Text (verbatim): "赵灵儿"
Constraints: maintain consistent character likeness across all 9 panels, preserve traditional Chinese beauty aesthetic, keep torn paper framing device uniform
Avoid: realistic photography, anime 2D style, inconsistent character appearance between panels, cluttered backgrounds, deformed facial features
